---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability, integration, or developer workflow improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What practical problem are you trying to solve? Avoid solution-first wording if possible.

## Proposed Change

Describe the capability you want. If relevant, include API shape, config fields, artifact expectations, or CLI behavior.

## Target Scenario

Pick the workload this request is for:

- streaming inference
- meeting analysis
- long-audio monitoring
- training / finetuning
- pretrained EEND inference
- checkpoint export
- packaging / release engineering
- other

## Why the Current Project Falls Short

What is missing today? Be specific about the current limitation, friction, or workaround.

## Prior Art

Links to papers, repos, products, or internal implementations that show the feature in action.

## Acceptance Criteria

How should maintainers know this is done? List the minimum expected outcomes, tests, or docs.

## Additional Context

Anything else that helps maintainers scope the request.
